title: Aurora Cannabis (ACB) - The Motley Fool Stock Analysis
text: Motley Fool coverage of Aurora Cannabis provides educational analysis and investment perspective on cannabis sector company. Company overview: Aurora Cannabis is diversified cannabis company focused on global medical cannabis markets. The company operates cultivations and distribution networks across multiple regulated jurisdictions. Investment thesis: Core investment case centered on global medical cannabis market opportunity and Aurora's competitive positioning. High-margin international medical expansion viewed as primary value driver. Profitability trajectory: Company achieved important milestone of full-year positive adjusted EBITDA in fiscal 2024. FY2025 showed significant acceleration with $49.7 million adjusted EBITDA on $343 million revenue. Path to GAAP profitability improving with focus on higher-margin medical products. Risk factors: Cannabis sector regulatory risks particularly around U.S. legalization timing. International market development execution risks. Consumer cannabis business headwinds offset by medical growth. Balance sheet: Strong cash position and debt-free status provides financial flexibility. Ability to pursue strategic acquisitions and capacity expansion. Free cash flow generation increasingly robust. Valuation: Motley Fool analysts assess valuation relative to cannabis sector peers. Forward multiples based on revenue and adjusted EBITDA metrics. Growth potential vs. near-term profitability tradeoff analyzed. Sentiment: Generally positive on long-term medical cannabis opportunity with near-term execution risks acknowledged.
